name: pytest-selenium
description: Pytest plugin for running Selenium WebDriver tests, providing fixtures for browsers, capabilities and Sauce Labs/BrowserStack integration.

seo.title: pytest-selenium — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: pytest-selenium: Pytest plugin for running Selenium WebDriver tests, providing fixtures for browsers, capabilities and Sauce Labs/BrowserStack integration.

when_to_use: Browser fixtures with BrowserStack/Sauce Labs integration
Selenium WebDriver test execution across browsers in CI
Screenshot capture on test failure for debugging
Capability-based browser configuration per test session

pros: Browser and capabilities fixtures baked in
Good fit for existing pytest suites
cons: Selenium is aging vs Playwright and Cypress
Flaky by nature of WebDriver stack
pytest-playwright is usually a better choice today
review.verdict: Only pick this if you are stuck on Selenium; new browser tests belong in Playwright or Cypress.
review.best_for: Legacy Selenium suites migrated into pytest
review.not_for: Greenfield browser testing where Playwright offers far less flakiness
